    462271351*X^26*Y - 1675865191611*X^26 - 261059095*X^25*Y - 318571456074*X^25 - 879637411*X^24*Y + 
    2459875989719*X^24 + 421357697*X^23*Y + 1570869988560*X^23 + 1503727029*X^22*Y - 2389662727857*X^22 - 
    282422801*X^21*Y - 2310141284498*X^21 - 2179745361*X^20*Y + 1663354268505*X^20 - 343522723*X^19*Y + 
    1706279485620*X^19 + 2400692229*X^18*Y - 1101443092880*X^18 + 1270633050*X^17*Y - 504140661864*X^17 -
